title: BAI Issues Advisory on Unauthorized Badminton Premier League Season 2
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has issued an advisory regarding an unauthorized league, highlighting domestic governance.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) has released an advisory concerning the "Passion Sphere presents Badminton Premier League – Season 2," stating it is an unauthorized event.

title: Grassroot Coaches Development Program Circular for Guwahati and Raipur
indian_angle: This circular details a coaches development program in India, crucial for nurturing future Indian badminton talent.
summary: BAI has issued a circular for a Grassroot Level Coaches Development Program to be held at NCE Guwahati and Raipur from July 15-24, 2026.

title: Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Tournament in Chennai Announced
indian_angle: This circular announces a significant All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament, a key event for Indian players to improve national standings.
summary: The BAI has released a circular for the Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament 2026, scheduled to take place in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, from July 16-23, 2026.

title: Thomas Cup Squad Reassembles for Asian Games; Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: The reassembly of the Thomas Cup squad and the return of Treesa-Gayatri are key developments for India's Asian Games badminton contingent.
summary: The Indian Thomas Cup squad is reassembling for the upcoming Asian Games, with the notable return of the women's doubles pair Treesa Jolly and Gayatri Gopichand.

title: Tanvi Sharma's Game Compared to Saina Nehwal and PV Sindhu
indian_angle: This article provides an in-depth analysis of young Indian talent Tanvi Sharma, comparing her playing style to national legends.
summary: An analysis explores whether young Indian shuttler Tanvi Sharma's game development more closely resembles that of Saina Nehwal or PV Sindhu.

title: Coach Tan Kim Her's Role in Pairing Hariharan and Arjun
indian_angle: This feature highlights the strategic coaching by Tan Kim Her in forming another promising Indian men's doubles pair, Hariharan and Arjun.
summary: The article details how doubles coach Tan Kim Her was instrumental in pairing Hariharan Amsakarunan and Arjun M.R., following his success with Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty.
